notes: Hand-authored/exported design kit already in claude.ai/design upload layout (bundle format 4, _ds_manifest.json + group-level *.card.html + @dsCard markers). NOT produced by the design-sync converter; there is no repo dist/ to build from. Sync = faithful re-upload of the local kit folder into its origin project (re-adopted). No _ds_sync.json anchor by design; app compiles _ds_manifest.json from @dsCard first-lines.
